name: Derived Requirements to Safety
description: Derived requirements (not traceable to a higher level) are provided to the system safety assessment process.
rationale: DO-178C §5.1.2 / Tables A-2: derived requirements are defined and provided to the system processes, including the system safety assessment, so their impact is evaluated.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
